---
name: Failure Mode
about: Add or refine a reusable failure class
title: "[Failure Mode] "
labels: ["failure-mode", "status:draft"]
assignees: []
---

## Failure Name
Name the failure clearly.

## Trigger Condition
What conditions tend to produce this failure?

## Observable Signals
How does the failure show up?

## Propagation Path
How does it spread if left untreated?

## Containment Consideration
What slows or contains it?

## Reversibility / Rollback Concern
What becomes difficult to reverse?

## Proposed File Target
Where should this live in `/failure-modes`?

## Done Condition
What would make this issue complete?
